data.key_finding: DQN: experience replay + target networks stabilize deep Q-learning; Atari from pixels
DPG: deterministic policy gradient theorem; foundation for DDPG
TRPO: monotonic improvement via KL-constrained surrogate objective
GPS + CNN policy for real robotic manipulation from raw pixels; foundational visuomotor RL
Generalized Advantage Estimation; bias-variance tradeoff via exponential weighting of TD residuals
DDPG: deterministic policy gradient + replay buffer for continuous action spaces
Double DQN: decouples selection and evaluation to reduce overestimation bias
TD-error prioritization yields 2x faster learning; importance sampling correction
Separate value and advantage streams improve sample efficiency on Atari
A3C: parallel actor-learners replace replay buffer; on-policy deep RL at scale
End-to-end learning of options (temporally extended actions) via policy gradient over option policies
Manager-worker hierarchy with directional goals; transition policy gradient for multi-level learning
MAML: gradient-based meta-learning; few-shot adaptation connects to adaptive control
Randomizing visual parameters in sim enables zero-shot real-world transfer
MADDPG: centralized training + decentralized execution paradigm for multi-agent continuous control
HER: relabel failed episodes as successes for alternative goals; sparse reward breakthrough
PPO: clipped surrogate objective achieves TRPO-level performance with first-order methods
Hyperparameters, seeds, and codebases cause more variance than algorithm differences
Combines 6 DQN improvements; establishes SOTA on Atari-57
Progressive neural networks transfer learned features from sim to real without catastrophic forgetting
AlphaZero: MCTS + neural network generalizes across chess, shogi, and Go
SAC: entropy-regularized RL; stable off-policy learning for continuous control
TD3: clipped double Q, delayed updates, target smoothing fix overestimation in DDPG

data.title: arXiv:1803.10122

Unifying tutorial: RL as inference in graphical model; connects entropy, KL, and optimal control
HIRO: off-policy correction for hierarchical goal-conditioned RL; enables reuse of experience

Bridges control theory and RL; shows classical results imply strong baselines for RL benchmarks
PPO + domain randomization on Shadow Hand; precursor to Rubik's cube work
Backpropagation through MPC solver enables end-to-end learning of cost functions
Extends LQR beyond quadratic costs; convex formulation with constraints
PlaNet: latent dynamics model with RSSM; planning in latent space from image observations
SAC v2: automatic entropy tuning; state-of-the-art on MuJoCo locomotion benchmarks
MBPO: short model rollouts branching from real data; monotonic improvement guarantee
Automatic domain randomization enables sim-to-real transfer for dexterous manipulation
MuZero: learns dynamics model without game rules; plans in latent space with MCTS
OpenAI Five: multi-agent RL at scale; beats world champion team in Dota 2
Maximum likelihood model training misaligned with control performance; proposes alternatives
Contrastive learning on augmented observations yields sample-efficient visual RL
Combines control Lyapunov functions and control barrier functions with model-free RL
Comprehensive tutorial on distributional shift, pessimism, and offline policy evaluation
Code-level choices (clipping, normalization) matter more than algorithm choice for PPO/TRPO
CQL: lower-bounds Q-values on out-of-distribution actions; prevents overestimation without data
Independent PPO competitive with specialized MARL methods; questions need for complex architectures
Taxonomy: domain randomization, system identification, domain adaptation, curriculum transfer
DreamerV2: discrete latent representations; first world model to match model-free on Atari
Teacher-student distillation enables blind quadruped locomotion over rough terrain
Model need only be value-equivalent, not observation-equivalent; formalizes decision-aware models
MAPPO: simple PPO with parameter sharing matches specialized MARL algorithms on SMAC
Casts RL as sequence prediction conditioned on desired return; no Bellman backup needed
DrQ-v2: simple augmentation + DDPG achieves state-of-the-art visual control; no encoder pretraining
IQL: avoids querying out-of-distribution actions entirely via expectile regression
TD-MPC: learned latent dynamics + MPPI planning + TD learning; sample-efficient continuous control
VaGraM: weights model gradients by value gradient magnitude; improves policy-relevant accuracy
Comprehensive taxonomy of safe RL: constrained MDPs, Lyapunov methods, barrier functions, shielding
Comprehensive taxonomy: dynamics models, planning, policy learning, and hybrid approaches
IRIS: autoregressive Transformer world model; 2 hours of game-play matches 50M frame methods
DreamerV3: single algorithm across 150+ tasks; symlog predictions + entropy regularization
